title: USYS
text: USYS Specifies the name and location of the Uniface system directory. USYS = DirectoryPath Default value UnifaceApsDir /common/usys File section [paths] Description If this cannot be resolved, the default is the current directory. Some Uniface files are assumed to be in the USYS subdirectory, but can be moved to a different location by adding an entry to usys.asn . These files include Uniface application forms.
